title: Real-site enablement: opt-in real tier, selector discovery, UC1-3 real acceptance (D-002)
supersedes: manager-4's PARTIAL/CDP-gated handoff (same path). The operator opened the CDP browser; this manager ran the real legs (T2 discovery, T3 UC1-3) and the full T4 verification panel. This is the FINAL mission handoff.
STATUS: PARTIAL (successful — real tier ENABLED + verified; UC1+UC3 real-PASS; UC2 real-PARTIAL on a documented D-001 design limitation, not a defect)
headline: Real-site automation via operator-consented CDP attach is now WORKING and independently verified. UC1 (ask_chatgpt() real text + continuity) and UC3 (ask-chatgpt CLI real text + --session continuity) PASS on live chatgpt.com. UC2 (patch-bundle out/retrieve/apply) is PARTIAL: the D-001 fenced-base64-zip fallback is not realizable from LLM output and no real Playwright Download event fires, so the bundle channel needs a design revision (recommended follow-up). The T4 best-of-N panel (T4a tier-purity+CDP-safety, T4b D-002-conformance+no-stealth+budget+leakage, T4c findings+D-001) is UNANIMOUS PASS over an authoritative suite (169 passed / 1 deselected / exit 0). Reaching real UC1/UC3 required 7 incremental real-path driver/bundle fixes (T2c-T2h) plus T2 discovery and T2b selector install; the mock tier stayed byte-identical throughout. Budget 24/30 ledger lines (~11 actual sends); 30 NEVER exceeded. No stealth; no login automation; no credential/account-identifier leakage; operator browser+tabs preserved.

telemetry.ACTUAL: Mission PARTIAL-complete. Wall-clock from first manager start 2026-06-12T09:59:16 -> 2026-06-12T23:02 ~= 783m elapsed, DOMINATED by idle (operator trip pause ~12:25->16:02 ~217m; waiting for the operator CDP window ~16:32->19:38 ~186m; inter-lifetime gaps). Active manager work ~= manager-1..4 ~111m + manager-5 resume4 ~190m. resume4 (this manager): ESTIMATE 140m / ACTUAL ~190m, dominated by iterative real-site bring-up (T2 discovery + T2b install + 7 driver/bundle real-path fixes T2c-T2h + 5 T3 attempts + T3-diag + T4 panel + synthesis).
telemetry.MESSAGES_USED_note: 24 ledger DATA lines across 3 ledgers (tmp/real-audit-20260612T100518 = 0; tmp/real-audit-20260612T111042 = 0; tmp/real-audit-20260612T194143 = 24). The 30-message HARD CAP was NEVER exceeded. Of the 24 ledger lines, ~11 were quota-consuming sends (T2 7; T3 attempt-3 1; T3 attempt-5 3); the rest are conservative log-BEFORE-send reservations on pre-submission failures during real-path bring-up (the protocol logs before sending, so failed-before-send attempts over-count). T2 used 7/12; T3 final accepted leg used 6 (cap 15).
telemetry.REWORK-CAUSE_detail: The driver/bundle were built mock-first; the real chatgpt.com CDP path exercised behaviors the mock never did (public api/cli cdp plumbing; URL-only conversation_ref; empty optional markers; SPA hydration timing; send-button-after-fill; stop-button-gone completion; hover-hidden copy; filename-chip upload; turn-relative message_body). 7 incremental fixes (T2c-T2h) closed these. Each was discovered only by a real run (or a 0-message diagnostic), then fixed mock-tier TDD + manager-gate-verified + committed. NOT env-drift/frozen-file/dependency-rot.

telemetry_lines: ACTUAL: M-006-resume4 ~190m (T2 real discovery + 7 real-path fixes T2c-T2h + 5 T3 attempts + T4 panel); PARTIAL — UC1/UC3 real-PASS, UC2 real-PARTIAL (D-001)
REWORK-CAUSE: spec-gap (real CDP mechanics not exercised by the mock-first driver; closed by T2c-T2h)
what_was_verified: Singleton election: a TRIPLE resume4 manager launch recurred (3 managers under team-lead 4327: tmux ...193152/...193303/...193414). Resolved race-free via an atomic lock dir tmp/M-006-manager.lock (mkdir test-and-set); this manager (pid 119225) WON; siblings stand down on the held lock (precedent: manager-1). RECOMMEND a per-mission singleton spawn guard in the launcher (2nd occurrence).
CDP preflight (manager, read-only /json/version): reachable, Chrome/149.0.7827.53. Re-checked before every real dispatch + after T2 detach (browser survived).
Budget from ground truth: 24/30 ledger data lines across 3 ledgers; 30 never exceeded; ~11 actual sends (ledger conservative).

T2 real discovery (manager-gate): exit 0, 7/12 msgs, all priority selectors found with stable hooks; real.json untouched by the worker (T2b installs); tab-hygiene self-check preexisting_tabs_still_present=True; CDP still reachable after detach; leakage scan clean; URLs anonymized /c/<redacted-uuid>.

T2b/T2c/T2d/T2e/T2f/T2g/T2h (manager-gate, each): authoritative uv run pytest re-run by manager (132->136->144->151->154->158->169 passed as tests were added; 1 deselected; exit 0 each); mock tier byte-identical; protected files (mock.json/conftest socket guard/selector_map/api/cli where applicable) unchanged per leg.

T3 real UC1-3 (manager-gate, attempt-5): UC1 PASS (REAL-SITE-UC1-PASS nonce + REAL-SITE-UC1-CONT codeword via URL-derived ref), UC3 PASS (CLI nonce + --session codeword), UC2 PARTIAL (DownloadUnsupportedError; no real Download event + no parseable fenced bundle); model fail-closed probe raised SelectorUnavailableError before send as designed.

T4 best-of-N panel (3 INDEPENDENT non-producers over ONE authoritative suite): T4a PASS (tier purity + CDP attach safety + fail-closed schema + decoupled fail-closed test), T4b PASS (NO stealth anywhere; CDP attach posture; login never automated; challenge-pause; budget 24/30; ZERO credential/identifier leakage; tmp/ gitignored+uncommitted), T4c PASS (10 unknowns honestly answered; UC1-3 evidence consistent + not overclaimed; UC2 D-001 finding sound; explicit D-001 recommendation; GAP-15 confirmed). Reports: orchestration/reports/M-006/T4a.md, T4b.md, T4c.md. Synthesis: verify.md (VERDICT: PARTIAL).

Safety honored end-to-end: connect_over_cdp only (never launch); brand-new tool tab only (operator tabs never touched); close()=detach-not-quit (browser never quit); login/logout never automated; NO stealth/anti-detection (grep clean); every real message logged before send; no credential/cookie/token/profile reads; no account identifiers in any committed artifact; uv used the project .venv (shared agent venv untouched).

open_items_recommended_next_missions.severity: major — UC2 not green on real
open_items_recommended_next_missions.detail: The fenced-base64-zip fallback cannot be produced by an LLM (no byte-exact zip + correct SHA-256) and no real Playwright Download event fires. KEEP D-001 DOM-primary text read (real-proven). REVISE the UC2 bundle return channel: either a true downloadable/artifact integration Playwright can capture+validate, OR a text-native deterministic edit format (unified diff / structured JSON edit ops) validated+applied locally. Retain fenced-base64-zip parsing only for mock/precomputed deterministic producers. NOT a defect/regression/safety issue.

open_items_recommended_next_missions.severity: moderate — continuity capability proven but auto-persist buggy
open_items_recommended_next_missions.detail: New-CDP-chat conversation_ref persists EMPTY (sampled in send_prompt before the URL settles to /c/<id>); UC1/UC3 continuity passed only via a tmp-only URL-derived registry repair. Production fix: refresh the active conversation ref from session.page.url after wait_for_completion, before registry set(), for both text and bundle paths. Mock-tier TDD-able; no real messages needed to fix; a real re-validation (1-2 msgs) would confirm.
The triple-launch apparatus bug recurred. Add a launcher-level singleton guard so only one manager per mission spawns.

open_items_recommended_next_missions.item: Optional: real re-validation after GAP-15 fix + UC2 channel revision
open_items_recommended_next_missions.detail: ~16 ledger lines of budget remain (24/30). A future real leg can re-validate UC1/UC3 continuity without the tmp repair and exercise the revised UC2 channel.

complexity_paradigm_signals: Real-site browser automation is an iterative bring-up: the mock-first driver hid ~9 real-only behaviors (cdp public plumbing, URL-only ref, empty optional markers x2 paths, SPA hydration, send-after-fill, completion-via-stop-gone, hover-hidden copy, filename-chip upload, turn-relative body). 'Measure don't guess' paid off: a 0-message CDP diagnostic (T3-diag) and READING T2's proven-working discovery script (tmp/m006_t2_cdp_discovery.py) turned guesswork into precise fixes. Future real-site work should budget for several such fix cycles and prefer porting a proven raw-Playwright reference into the driver.

D-001 fenced-base64-zip bundle fallback is fundamentally unsuited to LLM-generated output (probabilistic prose cannot emit deterministic zip bytes + matching SHA-256). This is the headline product finding: the bundle return channel needs a deterministic producer or a text-native edit format.

log-BEFORE-send (a safety must) over-counts the ledger on pre-submission failures; during multi-attempt real bring-up the ledger drifted above actual quota (24 ledger vs ~11 sent). Future managers: track actual confirmed sends separately and treat the ledger as a conservative upper bound, but still enforce the cap on the ledger.

TOOLING GOTCHA (carried): the global destructive-guard hook blocks git checkout/clean (substring-matches comments too); commit via `git commit -F <file>` to keep long messages off the command line; use `git stash push -u` for reverts.

Headless-manager discipline held across the whole resume4: foreground watches only (--wait-seconds 480 looped), run-dirs recorded, every real dispatch behind a re-checked safety gate (lock+CDP+no-concurrent-real-worker+budget), handoff written before turn end. No backgrounded watches.
resume_ready_state_pointer: orchestration/state/M-006-state.json (mission PARTIAL-complete; T1/T1b/T2/T2b/T2c-T2h/T3/T4 all recorded; UC1/UC3 real-PASS, UC2 real-PARTIAL; HEAD at the closeout commit; manager_pid 119225; budget 24/30). A future manager picking up the open items: read verify.md + this handoff; the singleton lock tmp/M-006-manager.lock is held by the now-exited pid 119225 (stale — a fresh manager should reclaim it after confirming 119225 is dead). Do NOT re-run T1-T3; address the UC2 bundle-channel revision + GAP-15 as new missions.
